description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and five visible stories, constructed primarily from dark brown brick. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of large, evenly spaced windows, with vertical stone or concrete pilasters accentuating the front elevation. The roof is flat and houses several mechanical units, including HVAC systems and access structures. The main entrance is prominent, framed by lighter stonework and topped with a decorative pediment, suggesting a formal entryway. Subtle decorative elements, such as cornices and a central crest above the entrance, add a touch of classical influence. The building's overall appearance is utilitarian yet dignified, suitable for a professional urban environment.
description: A five-story, dark brick office building with a flat roof, symmetrical window layout, and a formal stone-framed main entrance. Subtle classical details and rooftop mechanical units complete its urban professional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with stone framing, decorative crest, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the repetitive window grid and rooftop mechanical units, with no visible entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain brick wall with minimal windows and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the window grid of the other side, with rooftop structures visible.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, grid-like arrangement of rectangular windows in horizontal rows and vertical columns, evenly spaced across all facades.
